mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.dept_desc, d.parent_id, p.dept_name as parent_name, d.dept_level, d.dept_path, d.leader_id, l.username as leader_name, d.phone, d.email, d.address, d.sort_order, d.status, CASE d.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM departments d LEFT JOIN departments p ON d.parent_id = p.id LEFT JOIN users l ON d.leader_id = l.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.dept_level ASC, d.sort_order ASC, d.created_at ASC

SELECT id, dept_name, dept_code, dept_desc, parent_id, dept_level, dept_path, leader_id, phone, email, address, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM departments WHERE dept_code = #{deptCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.dept_desc, d.parent_id, p.dept_name as parent_name, d.dept_level, d.dept_path, d.leader_id, l.username as leader_name, d.phone, d.email, d.address, d.sort_order, d.status, CASE d.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM departments d LEFT JOIN departments p ON d.parent_id = p.id LEFT JOIN users l ON d.leader_id = l.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY d.sort_order ASC, d.created_at ASC

SELECT d.id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.dept_desc, d.parent_id, p.dept_name as parent_name, d.dept_level, d.dept_path, d.leader_id, l.username as leader_name, d.phone, d.email, d.address, d.sort_order, d.status, CASE d.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM departments d LEFT JOIN departments p ON d.parent_id = p.id LEFT JOIN users l ON d.leader_id = l.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY d.dept_level ASC, d.sort_order ASC, d.created_at ASC

SELECT d.id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.dept_desc, d.parent_id, p.dept_name as parent_name, d.dept_level, d.dept_path, d.leader_id, l.username as leader_name, d.phone, d.email, d.address, d.sort_order, d.status, CASE d.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM departments d LEFT JOIN departments p ON d.parent_id = p.id LEFT JOIN users l ON d.leader_id = l.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.leader_id = #{leaderId} ORDER BY d.dept_level ASC, d.sort_order ASC
SELECT id FROM departments WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND ( dept_path LIKE CONCAT(#{deptPath}, '/%') OR dept_path = #{deptPath} )

SELECT DISTINCT child.id FROM departments parent INNER JOIN departments child ON ( child.dept_path LIKE CONCAT(parent.dept_path, '/%') OR child.dept_path = parent.dept_path ) WHERE parent.deleted = 0 AND parent.leader_id = #{leaderId} AND child.deleted = 0 AND child.status = 1
